title: Pentagon Dump Of UFO Files Add Intrigue To CT Sightings

title: Pentagon, Do Better. Your UFO Videos Look Terrible
description: On Friday, we covered the Pentagon’s UFO file drop because a filmmaker first showed the world a spaceship in 1902 (Georges Méliès’ A Trip to the Moon) and, ever since, Hollywood has created thousands of movies and TV shows depicting an endless array of UFOs and aliens. The entertainment industry helped invent this genre; we [...] The post Pentagon, Do Better. Your UFO Videos Look Terrible appeared first on NYT News Today .
